help: What to do for names not matched by a rule or bundle.
name: default
label: Default action

help: Domains to block, e.g. ads.example.com. Applied verbatim (no embedded quotes).
name: block
label: Block domains

help: Domains to always allow (useful with Default = Block).
name: allow
label: Allow domains

help: Named graph-backed posture bundles to apply, e.g. malware, phishing.
name: bundles
label: Posture bundles
